channel.title: MySQL on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in MySQL on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Logical backups with SQL dumps
item.description: Back up MySQL and MariaDB databases using the Plakar MySQL integration and restore them.

item.title: Physical backups
item.description: Perform physical backups of MySQL databases using file copy or Percona XtraBackup with Plakar.
